unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* Generate the curl_header struct for the user. This function MUST assign all struct fields in the output struct. */

function.name: copy_header_external
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_header_store *hs, size_t index, size_t amount, struct Curl_llist_element *e, struct curl_header *hout)

function.name: curl_easy_header
function.parameter_list: (CURL *easy, const char *name, size_t nameindex, unsigned int type, int request, struct curl_header **hout)

function.name: curl_easy_nextheader
function.parameter_list: (CURL *easy, unsigned int type, int request, struct curl_header *prev)

function.name: namevalue
function.parameter_list: (char *header, size_t hlen, unsigned int type, char **name, char **value)

function.name: unfold_value

unit.comment: /* * Curl_headers_push() gets passed a full HTTP header to store. It gets called * immediately before the header callback. The header is CRLF terminated. */

function.name: Curl_headers_push
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *header, unsigned char type)

function.name: hds_cw_collect_write
Curl_headers_init
Curl_headers_cleanup
curl_easy_header
function.parameter_list: (CURL *easy, const char *name, size_t index, unsigned int origin, int request, struct curl_header **hout)

function.name: curl_easy_nextheader
function.parameter_list: (CURL *easy, unsigned int type, int request, struct curl_header *prev)
